title: centaurea albarracinensis
intro: Centaurea albarracinensis, also known as Albarracin cornflower, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurea albarracinensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, as well as its antioxidant properties, which may help protect against oxidative stress. Centaurea albarracinensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for use in traditional medicine and as a natural remedy.
